title: WebAssembly (WASM) for the UI
description: Evaluate use cases for WebAssembly (WASM) in frontend applications, especially for compute-heavy tasks. Implement Rust/C++ bridges to leverage WASM for tasks like image processing or encryption, bypassing JavaScript engine limitations.
objectives: Evaluate use cases for WebAssembly (WASM) in frontend applications, especially for compute-heavy tasks.
Implement Rust/C++ bridges to leverage WASM for tasks like image processing or encryption, bypassing JavaScript engine limitations.
